name: @ghs-pictogram/core
description: GHS hazard pictogram data, types, and lookup helpers

scripts.compile: tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/cjs/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'})); require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/esm/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'module'}))"
